title: cynoglossum glochidiatum var. alpinum
intro: Cynoglossum glochidiatum var. alpinum, also known as alpine forked-horned or alpine cynoglossum, is a variety of the Cynoglossum glochidiatum plant, a species of flowering plant in the borage family. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an expectorant, relieving coughs and congestion, and its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of alpine cynoglossum include its potential to help alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and its ability to boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared for herbal use in various ways, including as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
